# Issue #28: Responsive adjustments

## Description
Ensure dashboard works on different screen sizes.

## Tasks
- [ ] Test on desktop (1920px+)
- [ ] Test on laptop (1366px-1920px)
- [ ] Test on tablet (768px-1366px)
- [ ] Stack panels on mobile
- [ ] Ensure touch-friendly button sizes

## Acceptance Criteria
- Usable on common screen sizes
- No horizontal scroll on tablet
- Readable text at all sizes

## Phase
Phase 4 - Dashboard UI
